NAVAREA XIX 66/16
BARENTS SEA
1. SEISMIC SURVEY FROM 27 OF JUNE TO 10 OF JULY BY FUGRO GALAXY-C6YY4
TOWING STREAMERS 1500 METER IN LENGTH IN AREA B0UND BY.

A. 71-17.6N 019-57.5E
B. 71-27.5N 020-24.0E
C. 71-24.9N 020-33.9E
D. 71-19.9N 020-34.3E
E. 71-15.0N 020-20.4E
F. 71-14.9N 020-06.2E

VESSEL REQUIRE A MINIMUM SAFETY DISTANCE OF 1,5 NM
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 50/16
